interaction_phrase: legislation considered by Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York) to appoint a Principal
occurrence_sentence: To address this, she supports legislation considered by Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York) to appoint a Principal Quantum Adviser for the DoD.

interaction_phrase: collaborative efforts with allies and within NATO
occurrence_sentence: The urgency to solidify the U.S. leadership in quantum technologies is driven by the competitive international landscape, particularly the advancements made by China. The analyst notes bipartisan support for maintaining a technological edge and the importance of collaborative efforts with allies and within NATO to develop a secure, quantum-ready strategic posture.

interaction_phrase: appoint a Principal Quantum Adviser for the DoD
occurrence_sentence: To address this, she supports legislation considered by [Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York)](https://stefanik.house.gov/about-congresswoman-stefanik) to appoint a Principal Quantum Adviser for the DoD.
